description_long: This object is a flintlock-style handgun with a curved wooden grip and a short, thick metal barrel. The grip is made of dark, polished wood, smoothly contoured and ending in a rounded pommel. The metal components, including the barrel, trigger guard, and hammer, have a matte, slightly worn finish, suggesting age and use. The trigger guard is a simple, rounded brass loop, and the hammer is prominently cocked above the grip. There are no visible modern features such as a magazine or slide, and the overall design is reminiscent of early 19th-century pistols. The object is compact, with a robust build and classic historical styling.
description: A flintlock-style handgun with a curved wooden grip and a short, thick metal barrel, featuring brass accents and a prominent hammer.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the curved wooden grip, brass trigger guard, and the short, thick metal barrel with the hammer cocked.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the brass barrel band, with the grip and trigger guard partially visible behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden grip, brass trigger guard, and the hammer, mirroring the details of the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the wooden grip and the alignment of the hammer and barrel, with the trigger guard visible below.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured and made of dark, polished wood, curving gently to fit the palm. It has a rounded pommel and lacks visible checkering or stippling, giving it a classic, sleek appearance. The surface is glossy and unadorned, with no finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, emphasizing a traditional, utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is a simple, rounded brass loop with moderate thickness, smoothly curving around the trigger area. It lacks undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories, and has a plain, polished finish with no visible texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical with a smooth, matte steel finish. It is unthreaded and lacks external features such as compensators or fluting. A brass band encircles the barrel near the grip, and there are no visible markings or decorative elements on the barrel exterior.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or barrel. The surfaces are plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns present.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: There is no visible magazine base or floorplate, as this is a flintlock-style handgun that does not utilize a detachable magazine. The grip ends in a rounded wooden pommel with no extensions, bevels, or finger rests.
